data.title: S&P 500's Record-Breaking Streak In 2024 Could Signal Caution For Investors In 2025, Warn Analysts: 'Stocks Do Not Go Up Forever'
data.description: The stock market's remarkable performance in 2024, with the S&P 500 hitting 54 all-time highs, may not be a positive indicator for the future, according to analysts.

data.title: Apple HomePod Could Be Delayed Until 2025: Top Analyst Predicts The Device Will Play Key Part In iPhone Maker's 'Smart Home Strategy'
data.description: Apple's ambitious smart home strategy, centered on a delayed display-equipped HomePod with advanced features, signals a major product repositioning akin to the Apple Watch's evolution, while Cupertino eyes further expansion with AI-driven devices and smart home integration by 2026.

data.title: Tesla's Global Sales Could Witness A Decline Due To Slowdown In Europe And US, Even As China Set To Rise This Year, Warns Expert
data.description: Tesla researcher Troy Teslike said on Tuesday that while the EV giant's sales in China are slated to rise this year as compared to the last, sales in the U.S. and Europe will drop, weighing down on the company's overall global deliveries.

data.title: Dollar Tree, Salesforce And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
S&P 500 Hits Another High As Apple Tops $242 For The First Time: Fear Index Remains In 'Greed' Zone
